ARGUED.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF HC 650 SACRAMENTO LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. As to the implied contractual indemnity the moving party failed to sustain its burden and show that Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant is entitled to a judgment on these issues as a matter of law. As to the breach of covenant of quiet enjoyment/constructive eviction issues, there are triable issues of facts to be determined by a trier of fact as to the reasonableness of Defendant vacating the premises in February 2019 under the facts of this case.
